step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("evidence on thiotepa use in osteosarcoma treatment")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First write up to two sentences analyzing the evidence, then state your clear answer choice using \boxed{letter} format.
Based on the retrieved evidence, thiotepa does not appear in any of the cited sources related to osteosarcoma treatment. While ifosfamide is prominently mentioned across multiple references — especially as a Category 1 recommendation for relapsed/refractory disease and in standard-of-care regimens — there is no documentation of thiotepa being included in any protocol for initial or recurrent osteosarcoma. Therefore, without support from current guidelines or studies, recommending thiotepa lacks sufficient clinical justification.
